sentences.arabic: كِتَابُ "كَلِيلَة وَدِمْنَة" هُوَ مَجْمُوعَةٌ مِنَ الْقِصَصِ عَلَى أَلْسِنَةِ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Knjiga "Kalila i Dimna" je zbirka priča koje pričaju životinje.
sentences.translationEn: The book 'Kalila and Dimna' is a collection of stories told by animals.

sentences.arabic: تُرْجِمَ هَذَا الْكِتَابُ إِلَى اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ مُنْذُ زَمَنٍ بَعِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova knjiga je davno prevedena na arapski jezik.
sentences.translationEn: This book was translated into Arabic a long time ago.

sentences.arabic: تَتَحَدَّثُ الْحَيَوَانَاتُ فِي الْكِتَابِ عَنِ الصَّدَاقَةِ وَالْوَفَاءِ وَالْعَدْلِ.
sentences.translation: Životinje u knjizi govore o prijateljstvu, odanosti i pravdi.
sentences.translationEn: The animals in the book talk about friendship, loyalty, and justice.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ كِتَابٌ مُفِيدٌ لِلْكِبَارِ وَالصِّغَارِ عَلَى حَدٍّ سَوَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: To je korisna knjiga kako za odrasle tako i za djecu.
sentences.translationEn: It is a useful book for both adults and children alike.

sentences.arabic: نَتَعَلَّمُ مِنْهُ كَيْفَ نَتَعَامَلُ مَعَ الْآخَرِينَ بِذَكَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Iz nje učimo kako da se inteligentno ophodimo prema drugima.
sentences.translationEn: We learn from it how to deal with others intelligently.
